name: Soma Textiles & Industries Limited
summary: Soma Textiles & Industries Limited manufactures and sells textile fabrics in India. It offers non denim fabrics, garments, and piece dyed fabrics. The company was formerly known as R.B. Rodda & Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Soma Textiles & Industries Limited in January 1992. Soma Textiles & Industries Limited was founded in 1940 and is headquartered in Ahmedabad, India.
